According to Protection and Return Monitoring Network (PRMN), a total of 1371 people were displaced from Ceel Afweyn, Sanaag towards Ceerigaabo, Sanaag, arriving in the week of 09 November 2025 due to Drought. Protection and Return Monitoring Network (PRMN) - 01 January 2026
